Bash(node -e "const YAML = require\('yaml'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const raw = fs.readFileSync\('../references/claude-for-legal/commercial-legal/skills/review/SKILL.md', 'utf-8'\); const match = raw.match\(/^---\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\n---\\n/\); if \(match\) { const fm = YAML.parse\(match[1]\); console.log\('name:', fm.name\); console.log\('description:', fm.description\); console.log\('argument-hint:', fm['argument-hint']\); console.log\('user-invocable:', fm['user-invocable']\); }")

Bash(node -e "const YAML = require\('yaml'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const raw = fs.readFileSync\('../references/claude-for-legal/commercial-legal/skills/review/SKILL.md', 'utf-8'\); const match = raw.match\(/^---\\r?\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\r?\\n---\\r?\\n/\); if \(match\) { const fm = YAML.parse\(match[1]\); console.log\('Parsed keys:', Object.keys\(fm\)\); console.log\('name:', fm.name\); console.log\('description length:', fm.description ? fm.description.length : 0\); } else { console.log\('No frontmatter match'\); }")
